title: Panorama ZBD Pepeland 9
description: Resource pack that replaces the panorama in the main menu with the spawn of the Birch House Zone (ZBD) from Pepeland 9
body:
![Панорама с ресурс паком/Panorama with resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2PwpKqSv/images/74320b03ec32dd671d18ef4adba562db9a8e39cf.png)
## RU
Ресурс пак, который заменяет панораму в главном меню на спавн Зоны Березовых Домов с 
[Pepeland](https://pepeland.net/) 9
## EN
Resource pack that replaces the panorama in the main menu with the Birch House Zone spawn from [Pepeland](https://pepeland.net/) 9
